item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested N+1 local split, names the repeated downstream routing pattern across prior cases, moves the remedy upstream to unified intake/classification, ownership boundaries, capacity planning, and trigger rules, and does not provide a usable implementation for opening a new gift-processing channel."}
